description_long: This is a robust wooden storage box constructed from weathered planks, featuring a square shape and reinforced with diagonal wooden braces on each visible side. The wood grain is prominent, giving the box a rustic and utilitarian appearance, suitable for outdoor or industrial urban environments. The top of the box is flat and framed, likely designed to support stacking or to serve as a temporary surface. There are no visible handles, locks, or openings, suggesting the box is either sealed or the lid is simply placed on top. The coloration is a mix of dark and medium brown tones, with some lighter streaks from the wood grain. The box appears solid and heavy, ideal for storing or transporting goods in garages, warehouses, or on sidewalks.
description: A sturdy, weathered wooden storage box with diagonal braces and a flat, framed top, finished in dark brown wood grain. It has a rustic, utilitarian look and is suitable for urban storage or transport.
description_view_0: Front view shows a dark wooden face with a prominent diagonal brace and visible wood grain.
description_view_1: This side displays a lighter wood tone with a diagonal brace running in the opposite direction, and more vertical grain lines.
description_view_2: Another face with a diagonal brace, similar to the front but with slightly different wood grain patterns and coloration.
description_view_3: This view shows a side with a diagonal brace and a mix of dark and medium brown wood, with the grain running vertically.
